job_description:
• Design and develop scalable applications on the Salesforce platform that solve complex business problems and deliver exceptional user experiencesCreate robust integrations between Salesforce and 3rd party applications using REST/SOAP APIs, middleware, and modern integration patternsLead features from concept through production—including technical design, development, testing, deployment, and monitoringWrite clean, maintainable code following best practices.
• Perform integration and smoke testing before deploymentAssess the impact of new requirements across the Salesforce org and all upstream/downstream applications, systems, and processesPartner with Product Management, and cross-functional teams to evaluate, scope, and deliver new development requestsDeep dive into existing applications to troubleshoot production issues.
• Identify and implement performance optimizationsParticipate in peer code reviews and share knowledge with team membersKeep up with Salesforce releases, emerging technologies like Agentforce, and recommend platform improvements 3+ years delivering production-grade applications in Information Technology and Software Engineering3+ years of Force.
• Com development: Apex, Lightning (Aura & LWC), and Visualforce2+ years with Lightning Web Components, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and Java for APIs/integrationsStrong foundation in object-oriented programming principles, design patterns, software architecture, and test-driven developmentExpert in Salesforce SOQL, SOSL, DML operations, governor limits, Sales Cloud, and Service CloudExperience with automated testing frameworks (JUnit, Selenium) and maintaining code coverage standardsProficient in REST/SOAP APIs, web services, and integration patterns (event-driven, batch, real-time)Skilled with Git, modern IDEs (VS Code, IntelliJ, Eclipse), and CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI)Experienced with Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban)Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills with collaborative team approachA related technical degree required Life at Salesforce Our Locations Our Locations North America Europe, Middle East, and Africa Asia Pacific Latin America Our Teams Our Teams Sales Technology & Product Customer Success Corporate Roles AI Research University University Overview Interns New Grads Advanced Degrees Associate Program Manager Talent Programs Talent Programs Overview Future Pathways India Return to Work Military Fellows Our Story Newsroom Blog Careers Trust Salesforce.
• Org Sustainability Investors Give us your Feedback Sitemap Legal Terms of Service Privacy Information Responsible Disclosure Trust Contact Manage Preferences Experience with Salesforce DX, scratch orgs, and CLI toolsExperience with managed packages, unlocked packages, or AppExchange developmentExperience building or implementing Agentforce agents and actionsKnowledge of Prompt Builder and prompt engineering best practices University Overview Interns New Grads Advanced Degrees Associate Program Manager.
• Manage source code with version control.
• And comply with deployment standards and governanceDevelop comprehensive unit and functional test cases.
• Maintain high code coverage standards.
